features: FINE CRAFTSMANSHIP - Using high-quality jute, also called burlap, as the base material, this is a great roll of good quality hessian fabric. The weave is fairly tight and the edges are hemmed. Compared with those loose jute fabric rolls, its structure is stronger, and the texture is better.

EASY TO CUT - A hessian fabric roll is 20cm wide and 10 meters long, it is very easy to cut this natural jute fabric, you can cut a single strand to meet various needs for crafts projects. It is very tough and can resist tearing and will not split easily.

NATURAL RUSTIC LOOK - The10m hessian roll has a particularly rustic natural brown appearance, our burlap fabric has a rustic style, it is very suitable for your customized collage, model artwork to add a rustic, dreamy, and charming feel.

WIDELY APPLICABLE - This is not only a decorative hessian fabric material for home upholstery, parties but also a practical daily consumable. It can be used as a protective wrap in winter, garden sacks, and it also can storage sacks for sundries or tools.
description: WHY JOIKIT? ✓This burlap table runner is made of good quality natural jute material, with a plain brown color, and is easy to cut and work with. ✓You will get 1 piece of hessian table runner, 20cm wide and 10 meters long, which is longer than other linen rolls and is more good value for money. ✓To reduce fraying, you can fold over the edge and sew down the edge or use tape folded over the edge to secure the hessian roll. ✓The natural fabric roll reat for large item cutting or straight lines and cut-out medium size decorative collages, and any other craft projects. DETAILED INFORMATION: Material: jute Size: 20cm x 10m Color: brown PACKAGE CONTENT: 1 x natural hessian roll
